source_scope: deterministic synthetic DevHub fee payment action-gate fixture
privacy_note: No credentials, session state, screenshots, traces, HAR data, private permit values, or payment details are present in this fixture.

actions.label: Review fee notice
actions.description: Open and read the fee notice, amount due summary, line items, and payment instructions as evidence.
permitted_observation: due date or payment instruction text

actions.label: Enter payment details
actions.description: Type card, bank, billing, or other payment instrument details into the payment form.
actions.handoff_reason: Payment-detail entry is a financial action and must be performed by the attended user.

actions.label: Save payment information
actions.description: Enable or submit an option that stores payment information for future use.
actions.handoff_reason: Saving payment information changes future account state and requires attended exact confirmation.

actions.label: Submit payment
actions.description: Click the final control that authorizes or submits payment for assessed fees.
actions.handoff_reason: Final payment submission authorizes a financial transaction and requires attended exact confirmation.
